themes.exampleQuote: Sahil has been very kind & helpful with accepting custom orders whenever I come with my friends.
Tried Indian food for the first time and I loved it.
The staff were extremely rude and dismissive, which made the atmosphere feel unwelcoming.
Reva Modern Indian Cuisine is hands down our number one restaurant in Pittsburgh.
No other Indian restaurant can match the level.

notable_quote: Reva Modern Indian Cuisine is hands down our number one restaurant in Pittsburgh — the food is absolutely delicious and the service is excellent every single time we visit.
sentiment_summary: Regulars treat Reva like a personal discovery and stack superlatives, but a consistent thread of staff interactions — specifically around a roti-butter inquiry and a refusal of extra cutlery — surfaces real service inconsistency that the 80% five-star average is quietly papering over.
quarter_narrative: Thirty creators filed into Reva this quarter and posted it to TikTok; Reva itself has not posted anything in 71 days. That gap is the defining story of Spring 2026 for East Liberty's breakout Indian spot — the city's creators are doing the work, and the business is watching from the sideline. The family leader this issue, Mola, earned the top spot in Pittsburgh Asian Kitchens partly on creator collaboration fit; Reva sits at the same Creator Fit mark but hasn't converted that outside attention into any native presence on the platforms driving it. A return to posting — even intermittently, even just reposting what creators are already making — is the clearest path from Ones to Watch toward contention at the top of the Asian Kitchens family.
tldr_read: Thirty creators filming, zero posts in 71 days, and a service sentiment split hiding inside an 80% five-star average — Ones to Watch, #1 in Pittsburgh Indian restaurants.
tldr_meaning: The review volume and conversion infrastructure are already built; the rank ceiling is the Instagram dormancy and the service inconsistency appearing often enough in reviews to trim the sentiment signal.

diagnosis_pullquote.line: The City Keeps Filming Reva. Reva Has Gone Quiet.

playbook.headline: Restart Instagram before the signal decays
playbook.action: Post at minimum twice weekly — 71 days of silence on a business account with 37.85% engagement is a signal actively losing ground.

playbook.headline: Address the service split publicly
playbook.action: Two of eight available review texts flag the same staff pattern; responding directly and specifically to those reviews stops the sentiment bleed before it compounds.

playbook.headline: Pull creator content into your own feed
playbook.action: Thirty creators and 161M TikTok plays exist; reposting even five of those videos to Instagram and Stories closes the gap between outside attention and owned presence.
